message:
Running command: 
# DRT is unblocked and computing: T1=05:30:49 T2=05:31:03 = 14s CPU in 5s real = good!
# Step log still 168 lines (step log is written by LibreLane's internal file writer, not pipe)
# The pipe drain captured all buffered output to /tmp/pipe_extra.log

# Check current tail of pipe_extra.log for DRT status
echo "=== Latest DRT progress from /tmp/pipe_extra.log ==="
tail -40 /tmp/pipe_extra.log 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== OpenROAD running ==="
ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CPU:"$3"%","RSS:"$6/1024"MB","TIME:"$10}'
cat /proc/956540/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|Threads)"

echo ""
echo "=== Check for final dir ==="
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL!" || echo "DRT still running"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | tail -6
